rationale: Elec. Code §258.009 addresses civil causes of action under an Election Code chapter and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: This chapter does not create a civil cause of action for recovery of damages or for enforcement of this chapter.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule governs Election Code civil liability and has no bearing on homestead exemption valuation thresholds.
